title: PropertyChange Variant Handlers Analysis
description: Analysis of ChangePropertyTargetHandler, ChangePropertyPerTileMovedHandler, and HitchanceHandler from Ghidra MCP

analyzedHandlers.name: ChangePropertyTargetHandler

OnModifyTargetProperties.description: Applies property changes from template's PropertyChange[] array to target entity properties

0x58.name: PropertyChanges
0x58.description: Array of property modifications to apply to targets. Each entry is 12 bytes.

analyzedHandlers.notes: Iterates PropertyChange[] array, checking IsMultProperty for each entry. Additive properties use UpdateProperty(), multiplicative use UpdateMultProperty(). Used for debuffs/buffs applied to skill targets.

analyzedHandlers.name: ChangePropertyPerTileMovedHandler

OnUpdate.description: Called each update cycle, applies property change scaled by tiles moved

0x5c.name: ValuePerTile
0x5c.description: Amount to add/multiply per tile moved

analyzedHandlers.notes: Uses actor's TilesMoved counter at entity+0x154. For multiplicative properties, formula becomes: 1.0 + (TilesMoved * ValuePerTile). Common use case: movement-based buffs/debuffs.

analyzedHandlers.name: HitchanceHandler

OnBeforeAnySkillUsed.signature: void __fastcall (longlong handler, longlong sourceEntity, undefined8 p3, undefined8 p4, undefined8 skillProperties)
OnBeforeAnySkillUsed.description: Applies hit chance modifiers before skill execution

0x58.name: HitChanceAttack
0x58.description: Additive hit chance bonus for attacks (default: 0.0)

0x5c.name: HitChanceAttackMult
0x5c.description: Multiplicative hit chance modifier for attacks (default: 1.0)

analyzedHandlers.notes: Verifies source entity matches before applying. Uses virtual method dispatch for ApplyToEntityProperties. Affects both attack accuracy and defense evasion.

relatedBaseHandler.name: ChangePropertyHandler
relatedBaseHandler.description: Base handler for simple property change effects

values.1: OnBeingAttacked - Apply when entity is attacked

0x68.name: ValueProvider
0x68.description: Optional interface for dynamic value scaling

0x70.name: StringValueIndex
0x70.description: Index into string array for tooltip display

0x74.name: InvertSign
0x74.description: If true, inverts sign for display purposes

0x20.name: CalculatedAmount
0x20.description: Cached calculated value after provider scaling

0x24.name: LastProviderValue
0x24.description: Tracks provider value for change detection

relatedAuraHandler.name: ChangePropertyAuraHandler
relatedAuraHandler.description: Aura-based property changes affecting nearby entities

0x58.name: PropertyChanges
0x58.description: Array of property modifications (12 bytes each)

0x60.name: Range
0x60.description: Maximum tile range for aura effect

0x64.name: LinearFalloff
0x64.description: If true, effect scales down with distance: value * (1 - dist/range)

propertyChangeStruct.name: PropertyChange
propertyChangeStruct.usage: Used in arrays by ChangePropertyTarget and ChangePropertyAura to specify multiple property modifications

entityPropertyTypeEnum.notes: All other property types are additive
